hero.title: Complete financial management
hero.subtitle: Finset provides professional clubs with a unique platform for centralising and steering financial flows, transforming operational complexity into clear, controlled decisions.

features.title: Core features
features.subtitle: Centralise all your sports financial operations in a single intelligent solution, fully compliant with FIFA and UEFA regulations.

squadManagement.title: Squad tracking
squadManagement.description: Visualise your current and historical squad, access detailed player profiles, and compare wage structures.

network.title: Financial oversight
network.description: Dashboards centralising financial flow visualisation and tracking of the club's financial evolution.

transferManagement.title: Transfer management
transferManagement.description: Centralise all club transfers with visibility over payment schedules and financial impact.

contracts.title: Contract management
contracts.description: Centralise contracts and documents, calculate performance-based variable compensation, and simulate the financial impact of new contracts.

forecast.title: Simulation & forecasting
forecast.description: Simulation tool for P&L line-item forecasting, with automatic report generation for submission to the regulator.

compensations.title: Compensation management
compensations.description: Automated calculation and tracking of training and solidarity fees under FIFA regulations, with alert notifications.

footer.description: The complete financial management platform for professional football clubs.
